title: Payload — cypherx.memory.usage.recorded
description: Contract 19.1 usage-metering payload emitted by the Memory service as the body of the cypherx.memory.usage.recorded Kafka event (Contract 5 envelope wraps it). Member of the usage-event family: shares the common metering shape (tenant_id + operation + units required) defined in usage/usage-event.schema.json, specialised for Memory operations (e.g. 'write', 'recall', 'score'). Metering events are NEVER sampled and MUST be produced via the transactional outbox pattern. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true). The MEMORY_SCORING_ENABLED flag defaults off; when off, Memory still emits write/recall metering exactly as today and never emits 'score' operations.

tenant_id.description: The isolation boundary that consumed the billable Memory operation (Contract 13). Resolved from the JWT, never from a request body. Also the Kafka message key and envelope partition_key for this topic.

api_key_id.description: The API key that authenticated the operation (Contract 18), or null when not key-authenticated.

agent_id.description: The agent that performed the Memory operation, or null for non-agent callers.

principal_id.description: The principal (human/service user) for non-agent callers, or null when an agent_id is present.

operation.description: Memory operation being metered (e.g. 'write', 'recall', 'score'). 'score' is only emitted when MEMORY_SCORING_ENABLED is on.

units.description: Map of unit_type -> numeric quantity consumed (e.g. {"items_written": 3, "embedding_tokens": 512} or {"items_recalled": 5}). Unit types are Memory-defined. Must contain at least one entry; every value is a number.

cost_usd.description: Computed monetary cost of the Memory operation in USD.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the metered operation in milliseconds.

request_id.description: Correlates this metering event to the originating API request.
